usage_rules.primary_action: Use Teal (#2a777a) for primary buttons, active navigation states, and key brand elements.
usage_rules.secondary_action: Use White with Slate-200 border for secondary actions.
usage_rules.accent_usage: Use Orange (#f7620b) SPARINGLY for 'New', 'Pending Action', 'Urgent', or 'Upgrade' CTAs. Do not use for main navigation.
usage_rules.backgrounds: Use #F5F7FA for the main app background to create contrast with white cards.

structure.sidebar: Fixed width (256px), white background, border-r border-slate-200. Navigation items should use 'Ghost' style with Teal text/bg on active state.
structure.header: Sticky top, white background/80 backdrop-blur, border-b border-slate-200. Height 64px.
structure.main_content: Padding p-8. Max-width 1600px centered for large screens.

grid_system.bento_grid: Use col-span-2 for main charts, col-span-1 for stats/lists.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.header: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

buttons.primary: bg-[#2a777a] hover:bg-[#236466] text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#f7620b] hover:bg-[#e55a09] text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

tabs.list: flex w-full justify-start gap-6 bg-transparent p-0
tabs.trigger: relative h-10 rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent bg-transparent px-4 pb-3 pt-2 font-medium text-slate-500 shadow-none transition-none data-[state=active]:border-[#2a777a] data-[state=active]:text-[#2a777a] data-[state=active]:shadow-none

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TYPOGRAPHY: Replace Inter/Poppins with Manrope (Headings) and Public Sans (Body) in index.css.
2. REFACTOR SIDEBAR: Create a modern Sidebar component. Use white background, subtle border. Active items should have a Teal tint background and Teal text.
3. IMPLEMENT DASHBOARDS: Build the Admin, Case Manager, and Partner dashboards using the 'Bento Grid' layout defined above.
4. USE SHADCN COMPONENTS: Use Cards, Tables, Tabs, and Badges. CUSTOMIZE them via className to match the 'components' section above (e.g., remove default heavy borders, add soft shadows).
5. COLOR APPLICATION: Ensure the Primary Teal (#2a777a) is used for 'Call to Action' and 'Active States'. Use Orange (#f7620b) only for notifications or 'pending' status badges.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures if needed.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use Slate-600/700 for body text, not Slate-400.
